title: populus macrocarpa
intro: Populus macrocarpa, also known as the Big-tooth Cottonwood or Black Cottonwood, is a deciduous tree species native to the western coast of North America. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Populus macrocarpa include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Populus macrocarpa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
